SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_MO_2M 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2013. It will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design 
with extra coverage in the gap. The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit 
(ICL) for the Part D benefit. 
Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The mail order pharmacies are 
currently referred to as standard
